narrative:
Miami Township U (precinct in Clermont County) has 673 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.1 percentage points.
